name: fde-consultant
description: Forward Deployed Engineering methodology for AI coding agents. The 5-stage loop (Stage 0 Reconnaissance -> Scoping -> Prototyping -> Production -> Feedback) with verifiable Trust Score.

skills.name: fde-consultant
skills.description: The core FDE Consultant Skill. Activates on any non-trivial product/engineering task.

tools.name: fde_recon
tools.description: Stage 0: scrutinize a real codebase before scoping (languages, deps, tests, tech-debt, ontology, risks) and emit 6-Q signals

tools.name: fde_decompose
tools.description: Stage 1: validate a 6-Q decomposition of a problem

tools.name: fde_roi
tools.description: Stage 1: compute ROI + payback + NPV for a business case

tools.name: fde_scientific_search
tools.description: Stage 2: generate architecture hypotheses with held-out promotion gate

tools.name: fde_evals
tools.description: Stage 4: 6-trait rubric scoring with PASS/FAIL verdict

tools.name: fde_ontology
tools.description: Stage 1: Palantir-style ontology extraction + Mermaid diagram

tools.name: fde_trust_score
tools.description: Stage 4: DeepSCR Trust Score (25+25+30+20) with SHA-256 audit trail

mcp_servers.name: fde-consultant
mcp_servers.description: FDE Consultant MCP server exposing the 7 tools above

trust_score_self.details: skill/SKILL.md references all 14 OP + 10 anti-patterns + Trust Score formula. 14/14 pytest pass. 6 MCP tools exposed. SHA-256 of 3 case studies verified.
